panels.description: If “No data” is displayed, please wait at least two days for the data to accumulate before checking again.

targets.expr: abs((sum(max($cost_measure offset 1d) by (product_code, instance_id)) - sum(max($cost_measure offset 2d) by (product_code, instance_id)))) / abs(sum(max($cost_measure offset 2d) by (product_code, instance_id)))

panels.title: Cost ratio- $cost_measure

targets.expr: abs(sum(max($cost_measure) by (product_code, instance_id)) ) * abs(sum(max($cost_measure offset 1d) by (product_code, instance_id))) / abs(sum(max($cost_measure offset 2d) by (product_code, instance_id)))

panels.description:
The cost data are daily T+1 data (i.e., settled one day later).

The capacity data are collected in real time on an hourly basis.
panels.title: Cluster Cost & Cluster Capacity Trend Chart

panels.description: Total predicted expenses for this month-${cost_measure:text}
panels.title: Total Forecast Spend This Month- $cost_measure

panels.description:
“Namespace cost” is estimated based on recent compute resource consumption and represents the undiscounted, original billing price.

The calculation formula is:
Σ(Pod resource requests/Node total capacity) × Node unit price

targets.expr:
#由于某些namespace可能没有配cpu或内存request，保证结果展示全量的namespace
max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 

#cpu分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"} * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
* 

#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#内存分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"} * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

#内存权重
*
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#ECI成本
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(label_replace(pod_current_price, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)")) by (exported_pod, namespace) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

# GPU节点
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

sum(node_current_price or pod_current_price) * ($__interval_ms/1000) 

-

#由于某些namespace可能没有配cpu或内存request，保证结果展示全量的namespace
max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 

#cpu分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

#ECI成本

# GPU节点
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
)

*

+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)


))
/
scalar(
 sum(node_current_price or pod_current_price) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
)
*
scalar(abs(sum(max(sum($cost_measure)) by (product_code, instance_id)) )) > 0 or vector(0)

(count(
((count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) 
== 4)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
)or vector(0))

count(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
-
(count(
((count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) 
== 4)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
)or vector(0))
-
(count(
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) == sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)
and
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) == sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
)or vector(0))

targets.legendFormat: Total CPU cores in the cluster

matcher.options: Total core-hour resource consumption of the pod (Cost Per Core Hour)

targets.expr: sum( rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{ namespace!="",container!="",container!="POD"}[2m])) by (pod, namespace) / on (pod, namespace) group_right sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"} ) by (pod,namespace) * on(pod,namespace) group_right max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod,node,namespace) >0

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace!="",container!="",container!="POD"}) by (pod, namespace) / on(pod, namespace) group_right sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"} ) by (pod, namespace) * on(pod,namespace) group_right max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod,namespace,node) > 0
max(kube_pod_info) by(pod, node,namespace) * on (pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{ phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) > 0

sum(
 
label_replace(label_replace(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_PROCESS_MEM_USED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,PodName), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

/ on(node) group_left 

label_replace(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s])) by (NodeName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

) by (node, pod)

sum(
 
label_replace(label_replace(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,PodName), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

/ on(node) group_left 

label_replace(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

) by (node, pod)

renameByName.Value #E (lastNotNull): Pod Cost Per Core Hour (Total Cost in Yuan for the Selected Time Range)
renameByName.Value #F (sum): Total core-hour resource consumption of the pod (Cost Per Core Hour)

targets.expr:
# 筛选逻辑：找出以下所有pod，使用or聚合，可以得到所有burstable和besteffort的pod，但besteffort没有这些设置值，所有不会展示。
# 1、未设置cpu requests
# 2、未设置mem requests
# 3、未设置cpu limits
# 4、未设置mem limits
# 5、设置了cpu requests和limits，但二者不相等
# 6、设置了mem requests和limits，但二者不相等

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) * 1000
* 
(((count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
# 如果有对应的设置值，这里一定会大于1.
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)) * 0 + 1)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
# max(kube_pod_status_phase)必须加括号，因为request or limit可能设置为0，这里需要限制仅仅是kube_pod_status_phase > 0。

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) /1024/1024
* 
(((count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)) * 0 + 1)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
# max(kube_pod_status_phase)必须加括号，因为request or limit可能设置为0，这里需要限制仅仅是kube_pod_status_phase > 0。

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) * 1000
* 
(((count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)) * 0 + 1)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
# max(kube_pod_status_phase)必须加括号，因为request or limit可能设置为0，这里需要限制仅仅是kube_pod_status_phase > 0。

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) /1024/1024
* 
(((count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace)) == 1
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)) * 0 + 1)
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
# max(kube_pod_status_phase)必须加括号，因为request or limit可能设置为0，这里需要限制仅仅是kube_pod_status_phase > 0。

# 这里单独一个query做node维度展示，是因为kube_pod_status_phase{}不存在node label，因此最后一句max(kube_pod_status_phase)需要使用group by聚合，语法要求只能去掉max(kube_pod_status_phase)>0外面的括号.

# 解决方式是外层再加一个kube_pod_container_resource_requests，用于去除best effort pod的展示。

(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace,node) +1)
*
(((count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace,node)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace,node)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace,node)) == 1
or
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(pod,namespace,node)) == 1
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace,node) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace,node)
or
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace,node) != sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace,node)) * 0 + 1)
* 
on(pod,namespace) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0

renameByName.Value #F (sum): Total core-hour resource consumption of the pod (Cost Per Core Hour)

targets.expr:
sum( rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{ namespace!="",container!="",container!="POD"}[2m])) by (pod, namespace) * 1000 
* 
((count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) 
== 4)/4
* 
(max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace!="",container!="",container!="POD"}) by (pod, namespace,node) /1024/1024 *
((count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace,node)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace,node)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace,node)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace,node)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace,node)) 
== 4)/4
* on(pod,namespace) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0

((count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) +
(count(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"})by(pod,namespace)+2 or max(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics"})by(pod,namespace)) 
== 4)/4
* (max(kube_pod_status_phase{job="_kube-state-metrics", phase="Running"})by(pod,namespace) > 0)
* on (pod,namespace) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{ phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod)

renameByName.Value #E (lastNotNull): Pod Cost Per Core Hour (Total Cost in Yuan for the Selected Time Range)
renameByName.Value #F (sum): Total core-hour resource consumption of the pod (Cost Per Core Hour)

panels.description:
“Namespace cost” is estimated based on recent compute resource consumption and represents the undiscounted, original billing price.

The calculation formula is:
Σ(Pod resource requests/Node total capacity) × Node unit price

targets.expr:
#由于某些namespace可能没有配cpu或内存request，保证结果展示全量的namespace
max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 

#cpu分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
* 

#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#内存分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

#内存权重
*
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#ECI成本
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(label_replace(pod_current_price, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)")) by (exported_pod, namespace) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

# GPU节点
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

sum(node_current_price or pod_current_price) * ($__interval_ms/1000) 

- 

sum(
#由于某些namespace可能没有配cpu或内存request，保证结果展示全量的namespace
max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 

#cpu分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
* 

#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#内存分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

#内存权重
*
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#ECI成本
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(label_replace(pod_current_price, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)")) by (exported_pod, namespace) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

# GPU节点

sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
)

targets.expr: count(max($cost_measure) by (product_code, instance_id, billing_date, subscription_type)) by (product_code, billing_date)

panels.title: Billing details of the cluster-cloud product dimension
Billing details of the cluster-Instance dimension

list.label: Actual/original bill
list.name: cost_measure
list.query: 优惠后实际账单成本 : pretax_amount,原价账单成本 : pretax_gross_amount

list.label: cost allocation model
list.name: cost_allocation_method
list.query: CPU模型 : 1, 内存模型 : 0, CPU-内存混合模型（推荐权重） : -10000, CPU-内存混合模型（自定义权重） : -1

list.description: Cost allocation model takes effect after "CPU-memory hybrid model (custom weight)" is selected
list.label: CPU Weight Setting (%)
list.name: CPUWeight
